knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active packet; zero Python outside packet.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["C001", None]})
print(int(df["id"].isna().sum()))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, None]})
df["was_null"] = df["monto"].isna()
df["monto"] = df["monto"].fillna(0)
print(df["was_null"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1, None, None, 2])
rate = float(s.isna().mean())
print("blocked" if rate > 0.3 else "ok")

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, None])
med = s.median()
s2 = s.fillna(med)
print(med, s2.median())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1, 1], "b": [2, 2]})
print(int(df.duplicated(keep=False).sum()))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"], "region": ["Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"]})
conf = df.groupby("cliente_id").filter(lambda g: g["region"].nunique() > 1)
print(conf["cliente_id"].unique().tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
q = df[df.duplicated("id", keep=False)].copy()
clean = df.drop_duplicates("id", keep="first")
print(len(q), len(clean))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a"], "batch": ["b1", "b2"], "v": [1, 2]})
q = df[df.duplicated("id", keep=False)].copy()
print(q.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "b"], "v": [1, 2]})
print("card_ok" if df["id"].nunique() == len(df) else "card_fail")

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([" lima ", "CUSCO"])
print(s.str.strip().str.title().tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(["S/1.5", "S/2"])
vals = s.str.replace("S/", "", regex=False).astype(float)
print(float(vals.sum()))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region_raw": [" lima"]})
df["region"] = df["region_raw"].str.strip().str.title()
print(df["region_raw"].tolist(), df["region"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, -2.0, 3.0])
print((s < 0).tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3, 100])
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
stat = (s < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (s > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
print(s[stat].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
required = ["id", "monto"]
missing = [c for c in required if c not in df.columns]
print(missing)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"inicio": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-05-01"]), "fin": pd.to_datetime(["2024-02-01", "2024-04-01"])})
print(df.index[df["fin"] < df["inicio"]].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
required = ["id", "monto"]
missing = [c for c in required if c not in df.columns]
print("drift" if missing else "schema_ok")

rows_in = 10
q = 3
print(rows_in - q)

audit = [{"event": "start"}]
audit.append({"event": "quarantine", "n": 1})
print(len(audit))

n_q = 1
print(n_q == 0)

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: conflict = same key with different attributes.
Theory: quarantine keeps rejected rows with reason.
Theory: schema drift fails explainably with column name.
